Notice Of Consolidated Discovery Motion For Order That The Truth Of Any Matters In Request For Admissions Are Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Dec-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANTS RICHARD KAIHARA, JEFF LANCE AND HAYMAN BROTHERS, INCORPORATED'S Consolidated Discovery Motion For Order That The Truth Of Any Matters In Request For Admissions Are Deemed Admitted - The motion is granted. Plaintiff shall provide responses, without objections or assertions of privilege, as to Defendants' first sets of form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and request for production of documents, as well as Defendants' second set of form interrogatories, within 20 days of the date of this order. The truth of the matters specified in Defendants' Requests for Admissions, Set One, is deemed admitted, and any objections thereto are waived. (Code Civ. Proc., 2033.280, subd. (a), (b).) Plaintiff shall pay sanctions of $640.00 (4 hours at $145/hr plus $60 filing fee) to Defendants' counsel within 20 days of the date of this order. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. Pro Tem Judge: Jim Weixel, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported.
